commands.review_summary:
The PR carries plugin-owned channel schema ownership into channel config validation diagnostics and adds regression tests for direct and metadata-shadowed Feishu/Lark schemas.

PR surface: Source +34, Tests +76. Total +110 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main validates plugin-owned channel schemas but formats the resulting errors through the plugin-agnostic raw channel formatter; the PR body also supplies redacted after-patch CLI config-validation output.
